headline: $1.7T Wall Street giant eyes turning dividends into Bitcoin
summary: Franklin Templeton (NYSE: BEN) is an asset manager with $1.78 trillion in assets under management (AUM) as of May 31. On June 18, the Wall Street giant filed with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) to launch two new exchange-traded funds (ETFs). The proposed ETFs, called the ...

headline: Is Franklin Resources Stock Outperforming the Dow?
summary: Franklin Resources has outperformed the Dow Jones index over the past year. However, analysts are tepid about its prospects.
